question.text: Trade modification is allowed for which parameters?

answer.text: Client code and custodian participant code
No modifications are allowed after trade execution

explanation.text: **The Logic:** After trade execution, only client code and CP code can be modified (within certain conditions). Price and quantity of an executed trade CANNOT be changed. **The Trap:** ORDER modification (before execution) allows price and quantity changes. TRADE modification (after execution) only allows client code/CP changes. **Cross-Exam Context:** Trade modification rules are tested in Series I. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Trade modification is mainly used to correct client code allocation errors after execution.
